message:
feat(sql): implement set operations (UNION/INTERSECT/EXCEPT) and fix memory leaks

Phase 3 of the feature gap implementation plan:

Set Operations:
- Add SetOperationType enum and SetOperation struct to AST
- Add parseSetOperation() for UNION/UNION ALL/INTERSECT/EXCEPT parsing
- Implement executeSetOperation() with hash-based algorithms
- UNION ALL: concatenates result sets
- UNION: concatenates and removes duplicates
- INTERSECT: keeps rows present in both sets
- EXCEPT: keeps rows from left not in right

Memory Leak Fixes:
- Add deinitTableRef() to properly free JOIN clause allocations
- Fix leaks in left/right table pointers, ON conditions, USING columns
- All 207+ tests now pass with 0 memory leaks

Tests:
- Add 4 parsing tests for set operations
- Add 4 execution tests with real data validation

files.patch:
@@ -41,10 +41,10 @@ This document compares LanceQL features against DuckDB and Polars for feature pa

 |---------|---------|--------|--------|-------|
-| UNION | **Parsed** | Yes | Yes | Needs execution |
-| UNION ALL | **Parsed** | Yes | Yes | Needs execution |
-| INTERSECT | **Parsed** | Yes | Yes | Needs execution |
-| EXCEPT | **Parsed** | Yes | Yes | Needs execution |
+| UNION | Yes | Yes | Yes | Full support |
+| UNION ALL | Yes | Yes | Yes | Full support |
+| INTERSECT | Yes | Yes | Yes | Full support |
+| EXCEPT | Yes | Yes | Yes | Full support |
